title: Scandi Blonde — Global Lightening & Tone
client_description: I want to be super bright blonde all over, like an icy Scandi blonde. I hate seeing any yellow or gold.

starting_point.description: Medium Blonde, virgin hair, healthy condition

steps.name: Lightener
steps.application: 1cm off scalp through ends first, roots once mids reach level 9

steps.name: Toner
steps.application: Rinse lightener, shampoo, towel dry, apply toner at basin

known_good_formulation.colour_theory: 20 vol safely lifts virgin level 7 three levels. At level 10, underlying pigment is pale yellow. V (Violet) neutralises yellow. P (Pearl, blue-violet undertone) adds icy reflective finish.
